basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has released the Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 Notification to fill 1 vacancy under Advt No. PAT 45/2026. This recruitment offers an opportunity for candidates with Master’s/Integrated Master’s in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/Chemical) with relevant R&D experience or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology with required experience. Eligible candidates can apply online before 30 July 2026 through the official CSIR CFTRI recruitment portal. Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 2 years experience in R&D, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 3 years experience in R&D
qualification.details: Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) from a recognised University and 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic institutions or Science and Technology Organisations and Scientific activities and services. Or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) from a recognized University or equivalent and 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic institutions or Science and Technology Organisations and Scientific activities and services.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.csir_central_food_technological_research: Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 2 years experience in R&D, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 3 years experience in R&D

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CFTRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) from a recognised University and 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic institutions or Science and Technology Organisations and Scientific activities and services. Or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) from a recognized University or equivalent and 3 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic institutions or Science and Technology Organisations and Scientific activities and services.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Project Associate-I position is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 2 years of R&D experience, or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Food/Biotech/chemical) with 3 years of R&D experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Associate-I post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Project Associate-I position announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR CFTRI Senior Project Associate-I recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Project Associate-I is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is CSIR CFTRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CFTRI is located in Mysuru, Karnataka, with the pincode 570020.
